Explore artifact · Draft

Feel the flow

Manipulate a disposable interaction prototype and export every parameter and conclusion.

Source prompt
Add a tag filter to the generated skill catalog without changing its portable publishing contract.

Summary

The fixture records a bounded catalog-filter change against the public synthetic project.

  1. 01Instrument
  2. 02Sources

Feel the flow instrument

Prototype code — not for production reuse by default.

Interaction model

5
At value 5, five catalog cards remain visible and the count reads “5 skills”.

Export the current state

Persist deliberate state in Markdown and, when structured, JSON.

Acta is a print-first engineering record. Fact = directly supported; Inference = reasoned from evidence; Simplification = deliberately reduced model.
